caption: A man wearing a tall, grey, faux-fur wig, glasses, and over-ear headphones is seated in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with beige suspenders and a red and white patterned bowtie. In front of him is a black professional microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with several framed photos and posters, and white storage bins. Red and white logos appear on the screen, featuring the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth moving and his expression shifting slightly as he talks. His position and the camera angle remain constant, while the background and equipment stay stationary, focusing the action entirely on the man's facial movements and speech.
